ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-13-2023 CONTINUED TO SEP-19-2023 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 70856714)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SUI AU'S MOTION TO QUASH FOR INSUFFICIENT SERVICE OF SUMMONS IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. THE DECLARATION OF DEFENDANT REFERRED TO IN THE PARTIES' PAPERS IS NOT FOUND ON THE COURT'S REGISTER OF ACTIONS. NOR WAS THE COURT PROVIDED A COURTESY COPY OF THE DECLARATION AS REQUIRED BY LOCAL RULE 2.7(B). AFTER THE DECLARATION IS PROVIDED TO THE COURT, THE MOTION MAY BE RE-CALENDARED UPON CONSULTATION WITH OPPOSING COUNSEL AND A DEPARTMENT 302 CLERK. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR., CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/RBU)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-22-2023 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-01-2023 Continued To Dec-19-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-02-2023 Continued To Sep-19-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash For Insufficient Service Of Summons
Off Calendar Oct-25-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SUI AU'S Motion To Quash For Insufficient Service Of Summons is ordered off calendar. The declaration of defendant referred to in the parties' papers is not found on the court's register of actions. Nor was the court provided a courtesy copy of the declaration as required by Local Rule 2.7(B). After the declaration is provided to the court, the motion may be re-calendared upon consultation with opposing counsel and a Department 302 clerk.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)
